boundary_statement: Q CAGE v1 provides quantum-aware artifact evidence and downgrade resistance. It does not claim post-quantum security unless real PQ evidence is verified.
description: Schema document for deterministic WUCI-QCAGE v1 attestations. This file documents required fields and does not contain live hashes.

wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.build_graph_digest_vector: sha256, sha384, and sha512 over the build graph evidence
wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.cage_attestation_digest_vector: sha256, sha384, and sha512 over the CAGE attestation
wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.crypto_inventory_digest_vector: sha256, sha384, and sha512 over the crypto inventory
wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.downgrade_checks: deterministic object of boolean downgrade checks
wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.public_evidence_digest_vectors: sha256, sha384, and sha512 for all public witness files
wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.qmd_inputs: object containing T_migrate, T_trust, and T_CRQC
wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.toolchain_checks: deterministic object of boolean toolchain checks
wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.witness_bundle_sha256: optional, present only when an archive-level digest exists
wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.witness_bundle_sha384: optional, present only when an archive-level digest exists
wuci_qcage_attestation_schema.witness_bundle_sha512: optional, present only when an archive-level digest exists
